positive: Stylized depiction of bioluminescent cosmic flora and fauna, centered composition, featuring intertwining geometric leaf motifs and glowing stylized nebulae swirls. The art style is a fusion of Art Deco elegance and detailed Polynesian tattoo art, rendered with thick, clean silhouettes and intricate linework. Use a deep indigo and obsidian black background contrasted sharply with vibrant electric cyan, magenta, and lime green bioluminescence. High contrast, symmetrical composition, isolated subject matter, perfect for apparel printing, digital vector quality, highly detailed linework.
negative: blur, artifact, watermark, signature, text, logos, low quality, bad anatomy, extra limbs, noisy, jpeg artifacts, grain, poor composition
